issues.title: Sev1: checkout API returning 500s
issues.body: Checkout is down for all users. Investigating now.
issues.author: sre@acme.com

comments.body: Never deploy code during an active Sev1 incident.
comments.author: ic@acme.com

docs.title: Postmortem: checkout Sev1 outage
docs.content:
Root cause: a bad database migration ran during peak traffic.
Never roll out schema changes during an active incident without a backout plan.
docs.author: sre@acme.com
